recommendations.title: I Want to Live!
recommendations.overview: Brazen perpetual offender Barbara Graham tries to go straight but she finds herself implicated in a murder and sent to death row.

recommendations.title: Il bell'Antonio
recommendations.overview: Problems arise for Antonio Magnano when he is unable to consummate his marriage to the beautiful Barbara Puglisi and his virility is called into question. Despite the fact that he loves his beautiful wife and they have otherwise been happily married

recommendations.title: I Kill Giants
recommendations.overview: Sophia, a new high school student, tries to make friends with Barbara, who tells her that “she kills giants,” protecting this way her hometown and its inhabitants, who do not understand her strange behavior.

recommendations.title: Barbara

recommendations.title: Dr. Who and the Daleks

recommendations.title: Love Is the Perfect Crime
recommendations.overview: Marc, in his 40s, is a professor of literature at the University of Lausanne. Still a bachelor — and still living with his sister Marianne in a huge, isolated chalet that they inherited when they were very young — he carries on one love affair after

recommendations.title: Perfect Sisters
recommendations.overview: Tired of their mother's alcoholism and a string of her abusive boyfriends, two sisters plot to kill her.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: 1984, Sandusky, Ohio. A naive 17-year-old navigates heartbreak and self-expression as he explores his sexuality.
